title: Sorry Status Page
description: Schema for a status page in the Sorry app platform

id.description: Unique identifier for the status page

name.description: Display name of the status page

timezone.description: Timezone for the status page (e.g., UTC, America/New_York)

state.description: Current state of the status page

locale.description: Locale setting for the page (e.g., en)

visible_to_search.description: Whether the page is indexed by search engines

created_at.description: Timestamp when the page was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the page was last updated
